esqlQuery.esql: FROM edot-assistant-docs-elastic | WHERE freshness_score < 0.3 | STATS stale_count = COUNT(*)

params.message: EDOT Assistant Alert: {{context.value}} Tier 1 documents have stale content (freshness_score < 0.3). Run 'python -m ingest.run_ingestion --tier 1 --force' to refresh.
params.subject: EDOT Assistant - Stale Tier 1 Documents Detected
